organization.name: Animo Solutions
organization.description: Development and consultancy on verifiable credentials, with an expertise in open source. Creators of the Paradym platform. Here to build. Animo is making it easy to build self-sovereign identity solutions. Whether it is through our SSI demo, development tools like Siera CLI & Siera Desktop, or our open-source development work. Animo is the maintainer of Aries Framework Javascript and contributor to ACA-Py, AATH, Anoncreds, Askar, vdr and the Aries RFC'S. Animo is an industry leader in open-source self-sovereign identity development and available for dev services and consultancy.
